# AIFullStack

> A knowledge base for AI full-stack developers. Covers the complete stack of building production AI products: technical implementation (Karpathy lens), growth & retention (Andrew Chen lens), and product strategy (Sam Altman lens).

> Audience: developers building AI-powered internet products. Does not cover model training or research.

## Getting Started

- [README](README.md): Overview, iron triangle framework, how to navigate the repo
- [中文版 README](README.zh.md): Chinese version

## Build — Technical Implementation

- [LLM Fundamentals](build/llm-fundamentals/README.md): Tokens, pricing, context window management, API differences across OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini, streaming, cost control
- [Prompt Engineering](build/prompt-engineering/README.md): System prompt design, structured output, XML tagging, prefill, few-shot patterns, anti-patterns, model comparison
- [RAG Production Guide](build/rag/README.md): Chunking strategies, embedding selection, hybrid search, reranking, complete pipeline, production failure patterns, evaluation
- [Agent Design](build/agents/README.md): Agent vs. Workflow decision framework, all workflow patterns with code, agent loop implementation, tool design principles, failure modes
- [Streaming Output](build/streaming/README.md): SSE implementation, reconnect handling, FastAPI backend, frontend integration
- [Infrastructure](build/infrastructure/README.md): Cost control, observability, rate limit handling, prompt security, deployment checklist

## Grow — Growth & Retention

- [Retention Mechanics](grow/retention/README.md): AI product retention benchmarks, why users don't return, 5 actionable strategies, cohort analysis
- [Cold Start](grow/cold-start/README.md): How to get first users by product type, YC framework (Hair on Fire vs. Future Vision), cold start failure patterns
- [Growth Loops](grow/growth-loops/README.md): Loop vs. linear channel distinction, 4 loop types for AI products, viral coefficient design, network effects
- [Key Metrics](grow/metrics/README.md): Growth accounting framework, metric definitions with formulas, PMF signals, stage-appropriate priorities

## Vision — Product Strategy

- [Positioning](vision/positioning/README.md): Painkiller vs. vitamin framework, competing with ChatGPT, vertical vs. general AI, moat types
- [Validation](vision/validation/README.md): Assumption stack, 3-step validation method, Mom Test questions, anti-self-deception techniques
- [Market Timing](vision/market-timing/README.md): Current opportunity window, 3-zone timing framework, what to build now vs. wait on, 6-month/1-year/3-year milestones

## Comparisons — Side-by-Side

- [LLM Providers](comparisons/llm-providers.md): OpenAI vs. Anthropic vs. Gemini — API differences, pricing, capability gaps, multi-provider strategy
- [Vector Databases](comparisons/vector-databases.md): Qdrant vs. Pinecone vs. pgvector — performance, cost, operational complexity, decision tree
- [Frameworks](comparisons/frameworks.md): LangChain vs. LlamaIndex vs. raw API — honest production experience, when each is worth it

## Case Studies — Full Project Walkthroughs

- [Enterprise RAG Chatbot](case-studies/rag-chatbot/README.md): 200-person SaaS company, 800 docs, pgvector → Qdrant migration, 88% accuracy
- [AI Writing Tool](case-studies/ai-writing-tool/README.md): Solo indie developer, newsletter AI for B2B SaaS, 4-6h → 45min, Day-7 retention 12% → 31%
- [Agent Workflow Automation](case-studies/agent-workflow/README.md): Sales outreach pipeline, Agent → Workflow pivot after production failures, 3h/day → 25min/day

## Templates — Runnable Starter Code

- [Minimal RAG](templates/minimal-rag/README.md): Complete RAG pipeline in ~130 lines, no external vector DB, in-memory numpy
- [Streaming Chat](templates/streaming-chat/README.md): FastAPI + SSE backend, vanilla HTML/JS frontend, no build step
- [Agent with Tools](templates/agent-with-tools/README.md): Production-ready agent skeleton, 5 example tools, human-in-the-loop confirmation

## Optional

- [scripts/search.py](scripts/search.py): CLI to search this knowledge base locally using keyword matching
